description.ko: 밀도 높은 유리를 통과하는 빛이 선명한 색채의 스펙트럼으로 분산되며 복잡하고 기하학적인 패턴을 만들어내는 매혹적인 탐구.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of light passing through dense glass, splitting into a vivid spectrum of colors and creating intricate geometric patterns.

prompt: A hyper-realistic close-up of a triangular glass prism refracting a single beam of white light into a vibrant rainbow spectrum. Chromatic aberration, caustic light patterns on a minimal white surface, sharp focus, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, translucent glass textures, ethereal atmosphere.
